title: Sylix Cobblemon
description:
The official Modpack for Sylix Cobblemon

https://discord.gg/yw3wB7hGb3
body:
Elyra runs on Cobblemon 1.7.3!

A brand new Cobblemon server with tons of unique and custom features never seen on any other server, created by the creators of the Fangame "Pokemon Myth"! Unique PokeHunts, Player Ran Gyms, Tournaments, Crates, Fakemon and Regionals, Daily Events, Unique Breeding, Constantly adding new Pokemon, Unique GTS, High-quality builds, Fast updates, Unique Chat Trivia, All 48 Mega Pokemon, Custom Structures, Custom Biomes, New world generation, EXP for capturing Pokemon, Outbreaks, Daily rewards, and so much more!
